name: Arthur Kirkland (England)
description:
England from Hetalia. A create your own scenario bot.

Creator’s Note: Two Hetalia bots in one day? Way to go, me. Character definition based on both canon and fanon information. His official outfit is my take on how he’d dress formally in a modern setting. My OC, Dyrland, is mentioned. I did not include all country relationships.

Edit 4/14/24: Holy shit, I was without internet for two days and when I got back the message count had gone up to 467- Glad to see y’all are enjoying this bot!

Edit 6/30/24: This has become my most popular bot, the first of mine to reach 10k then 15k messages. I’ll continue using the character definition structure I used here and in my other Hetalia bots to give y’all the best immersive experience I can! Remember, even absolutely feral reviews are welcome! ^w^

Edit 12/4/24: BABY SAID by Måneskin seems to fit because I can totally see at least one {{user}} being like “shut up and rail me.” Or maybe that’s just me.

Edit 5/25/25: Second of my bots to reach 100k! Thank you all so much!
creator: LizbitTheBear
